Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Emperor’s Intent]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor honed his Intent on the Elderspawn.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor's Intent can be channeled through a crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor's Intent can be used by the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Reading the Emperor’s Intent is described as an exercise in folly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — The Emperor's Intent is an authority that Calder wishes to avoid wrestling with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Emperor’s Intent glued the armor to Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor's Intent can be resisted as a matter of habit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor used Intent to stop a blow from Urg'naut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor’s Intent can reinforce armor for centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Any Reader attempting to Read an Imperial relic may be overwhelmed by the Emperor's Intent.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Emperor's Intent can press down on a Reader's awareness for centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Lucan was unprepared for slamming his brain into the Emperor’s Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor’s Intent provides protection that Bastion was unable to pierce.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
